# zohomail_domain_alias (Resource)

Manage a Zoho Mail alias domain relationship.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "zohomail_domain_alias" "example" {
  primary_domain = "example.com"
  alias_domain   = "example.net"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `alias_domain` (String) Alias domain name to attach to the primary domain.
- `primary_domain` (String) Primary Zoho Mail domain.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite identifier `<primary_domain>:<alias_domain>`.
